_meta.description: File-level coordination lock registry. Before editing, check whether file is locked by another participant. Add row when claiming, remove when done.

schema.expires_at: ISO 8601 — locks auto-expire after 2h of inactivity
schema.reason: string — what change is being made

_meta.expiry_policy: Locks expire 2 hours after claimed_at unless heartbeat refreshes them. Expired locks are released by next participant who needs the file.
